idea-plugin.name: fuku
idea-plugin.description:
IDE integration for fuku — a lightweight CLI orchestrator for running and managing multiple local services in development environments.

All services, one panel. No more juggling terminal windows.

Plugin Features

  • Services dashboard — real-time status, CPU, memory, PID, and uptime with tier-based grouping
  • Timeline visualization — per-service status history matching the fuku TUI
  • Log streaming — color-coded logs via Unix socket with search support
  • Service control — start, stop, and restart services directly from the IDE
  • Keyboard-driven — j/k navigation, s stop/start, r restart, / filter
  • Status bar widget — at-a-glance service health in the IDE status bar

What is fuku?

  • Tier-based orchestration with concurrent service startup
  • HTTP, TCP, and log-based readiness checks
  • Hot-reload with file watching and debouncing
  • Graceful lifecycle management with reverse-order shutdown
  • Simple YAML configuration — no plugins, no DSL

Documentation | GitHub
